name: Crock Pot Chili Con Carne
recipeIngredient: 4 cans red kidney beans, 1 lb each
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the shortening in a skillet over medium heat until hot and shimmering. Add the ground beef and cook, stirring occasionally, until browned and no longer pink. Drain off any excess fat using a slotted spoon or fine-mesh strainer.
2. Transfer the browned beef to a bowl and discard the fat remaining in the skillet.
3. In the removable liner of the crock pot, combine the onion, garlic, chili powder, crushed beef bouillon cubes, paprika, oregano, ground cumin, cayenne pepper, beef stock, tomatoes (including juice), tomato paste, and kidney beans. Stir well to ensure all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Place the liner with the mixture into the base of the crock pot.
5. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours or on high for 4-5 hours. If using an automatic setting, cook for 6-7 hours.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
